prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. We used PFE's daily adjusted close prices from May 2023 to May 2024 to estimate historical parameters. The annualized volatility (sigma) was calculated from daily log returns to be approximately 20.75%. The annualized drift (mu), representing the average log return over the past year, was estimated at -33.61%, reflecting the stock's significant decline over that period. The time horizon for the prediction is 7 trading days (7/252 of a year). The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution, and the confidence intervals are derived from this distribution using standard Z-scores for each confidence level. The calculated negative drift biases the central prediction slightly lower than the current price, while volatility determines the width of the projected price range.
